note: Red-team hidden-competition and engineering-reality sources. access=fetched means page fetched this mission; access=search means WebSearch result snippet verified 2026-07-03.

sources.claim: Discharge = air blown up through brick stack (>1000C), steam via water injection/OTSG; outlet temperature regulated by 'automated AI patented controls'; zero power-electronics content on discharge; controls proprietary/patented.
POWERSAFE = fully integrated MV heater + SCR + PLC/HMI control platform, up to 7200 V and 20 MW, merchant/configurable product — falsifies 'no merchant charge-control product at any price'.
DirectConnect 4160 V multi-MW SCR process heating, ~99% efficient, skid-integrated power control — incumbent merchant charge-side electronics.

Antora discharge = proprietary TPV cells (>40% heat-to-electricity, own 2 MW/yr cell fab, carbon blocks to ~2400C) — discharge stage is vertically-owned semiconductor, not an outsourceable common interface.
东方电热 (300217.SZ) wins molten-salt storage awards incl. Huaneng Xi'an Thermal Institute 6 kV 熔盐电加热器及其控制系统 (heater + control system) framework — China charge+controls slot held by a listed incumbent.

Published directory of Chinese CSP/molten-salt electric-heater manufacturers with project track records (含业绩) — merchant heater/control supply in China is a crowded, referenced market, not whitespace.

Heatcube molten-salt heat battery: resistive heaters at 93% power-to-heat efficiency, 'world's largest electrical heater for molten salt'; integrator owns system incl. controls — European second-wave player already self-supplied.
Kanthal 1.3 MW / 800C electric air-heater prototype for rock TES — the element giant is moving up-stack into TES heating systems, occupying the charge interface.
IEH electrode boiler 0-75 MW at ~10 kV MV, >350C steam, >250 MW deployed for German grid regulation — mature dispatchable power-to-steam substitute that skips the thermal bank and V03 entirely.
Across Brenmiller/Kraftblock/EnergyNest, discharge = rocks/water/steam into HRSG, steam turbine, Stirling or ORC — thermal-mechanical BoP with commodity drives, no common electronics stage.
Alliance members (Antora, Electrified Thermal Solutions, RedoxBlox, Rondo) are all vertically integrated system sellers — the named buyer universe for a merchant electronics layer in-houses it.
